ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the county election office */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the county election office */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "election_official" TEXT /* Primary contact for election management */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the county election office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the precinct */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "total_voting_machines" INTEGER /* Total number of voting machines in the precinct */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., Congressional, State Senate) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the district */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., President, Governor) */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., Executive, Legislative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party (e.g., Republican Party, Democratic Party) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party (e.g., REP, DEM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Leader of the party */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the candidate */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* Campaign website of the candidate */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the vote was cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the vote was cast for */,
  "votes_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate in the precinct */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., in-person, absentee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., 2020 General Election) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters for the election */,
  "total_voters_participated" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election where the ballot was used */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "ballot_design" TEXT /* Design of the ballot */,
  "total_ballots_issued" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots issued */,
  "total_ballots_returned" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots returned */,
  "ballot_status" TEXT /* Status of the ballot (e.g., issued, returned, counted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting machine */,
  "machine_model" TEXT /* Model of the voting machine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the voting machine */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the machine is located */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the machine was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_machines_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "voter_address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter registered to vote */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the voter is registered */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the voter */,
  "voter_status" TEXT /* Status of the voter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_voted_date" TEXT /* Date the voter last voted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_ballots" (
  "absentee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee ballot */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter who cast the absentee ballot */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election where the absentee ballot was used */,
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ballot used for the absentee vote */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the absentee ballot (e.g., requested, received, counted) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the absentee ballot was requested */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the absentee ballot was returned */,
  "reason_for_absentee" TEXT /* Reason for requesting an absentee ballot (e.g., illness, travel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absentee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_ballots_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_ballots_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voter_registration ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_ballots_ballot_id FOREIGN KEY ("ballot_id") REFERENCES ballots ("ballot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "early_voting" (
  "early_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each early vote */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter who cast the early vote */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election where the early vote was cast */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the early vote was cast */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the early vote was cast */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of early voting (e.g., in-person, mail) */,
  "reason_for_early_voting" TEXT /* Reason for early voting (e.g., work, travel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("early_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_early_voting_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voter_registration ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_early_voting_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_early_voting_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., provisional, certified) */,
  "ballots_issued" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots issued */,
  "ballots_returned" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots returned */,
  "ballots_counted" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots counted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, public user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., data entry, report generation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
